name: Round Black Wire with Natural Wood Handles Floor Basket - Brightroom™
description:
Add organization and decorative appeal to your living room, home office and more when you store everyday items in this Round Black Wire with Natural Wood Handles Floor Basket from Brightroom™. This round metal storage basket comes in a black powder-coated finish with contrasting double wooden top handles, providing a perfect addition to a variety of rooms in your home. The open top allows for easy access to the basket's contents, and wire sides provide visibility to what's inside. Set it on the floor near a sofa and stock with an extra throw blanket for guests, or place it near a bookshelf stocked with your family's favorite games.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.

Dimensions:
Top: 18-inch diameter
Bottom: 15-inch diameter
Overall height: 14-inch
Interior height: 13.5-inch
Top interior: 17.375-inch diameter
Bottom interior: 14.375-inch diameter
